ques: Open Players, filter for Dallas guards, then use the matching profile to report the player with at least 30 PPG and 9 APG, including his PPG, RPG, and APG.
Open Games from the top navigation and identify the two Game 6 cards shown on the NBA Games & Scores page, including each matchup and its listed broadcast partner.
On the Games page, compare the Season Leaders panels for the two Game 6 cards and report which matchup contains the single highest PPG leader, with that player's name and PPG.
Use the Schedule page's 2026 Playoffs Schedule view to find the East Conference Finals row on Tuesday, May 19, then report the two teams, arena, city, and game number shown for that row.
Use Standings to determine the Western Conference team with the best win percentage, then open that team profile and report its arena and head coach.
Go to Player Stats, sort or filter for Blocks, compare the top two players, and report both names, both BPG values, and the gap between them.
Go to Team Stats, switch to Point Diff, and report the top-ranked team plus its wins, losses, PPG, OPPG, and point differential.
Browse Teams by division, find the Pacific team whose profile lists Intuit Dome, and report that team's coach and record snapshot.
From the Thunder team page, open the roster and then the frontcourt player's profile; report his position, height, weight, last attended, country, and blocks per game.
Open Draft, choose the AWS Draft Combine hero story, and report two evaluation themes or traits discussed in the article body after opening the detail page.
On the Draft page, use the Draft Process Key Dates section to report the dates for the 2026 NBA Draft first round and second round.
Open Fantasy and use the 2025-26 Player Stats table to compare Luka Doncic and Tyrese Haliburton; report which player has more assists per game and both AST values.
Open Stats, inspect the Players leader matrix and the right-rail More Stats list, then report the top player shown for Points and the top player shown for Total Assists.
Starting from Search, look up spacing, open the Bucks half-court spacing article, and report the two offensive elements the article says Milwaukee is balancing.
Open Watch, choose the card that is a Highlights story rather than a Video breakdown, and report its title plus the two teams involved.
Open Tickets without signing in, compare the listed scheduled games, and report the matchup, arena, and starting price for the highest-priced ticket card.
Open Store, filter to T-Shirts, compare the available T-Shirt products, and report the cheapest product's name, team, color, and price.
Open Store, filter to Hoodies, find the Dallas item, then open its product page and report its price and all listed product features.

After signing in, open Store, compare the two jersey products by price, add the higher-priced jersey to the bag in size XL with quantity 2, then continue to checkout and report the pre-order total without placing the order.
After signing in, update the account profile so the favorite team becomes the Southwest division team with a 50-32 record, and set the saved payment last four digits to 9090.
